TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Enrique_Peña_Nieto, title = Enrique_Peña_Nieto, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enrique_Peña_Nieto} }

S.FORM: Enrique Peña Nieto ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Enrique Peña Nieto, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1966) mrhuw Mexico ta' misuw hya' ga Enrique Peña Nieto, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Enrique Peña Nieto ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 7, Enrique Peña Nieto, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1966) mrhuw Mexico ta' misuw hya' ga Enrique Peña Nieto, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: enrique pe*a nieto rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, enrique pe*a nieto, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw mexiʦ~ʨo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa enrique pe*a nieto, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
